// description: Local Claude Code hooks that wire praxis into the dev flow. Copy the `hooks` block into a CONSUMING repo's .claude/settings.json (or merge it in). Opt-in: praxis ships this as a template and does not enable it on itself.
// PreToolUse.git-commit: Before a commit lands, remind the author to run /review-changes. A nudge, not a gate — it never blocks the commit.

hooks.command: grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+commit' <<< "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" && echo '💡 praxis: run /review-changes on your diff before pushing — catches bad practices early and explains the why.' >&2; exit 0
git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || echo '💡 praxis: you have uncommitted changes. /review-changes will review them by routing to the developer / qa / architect experts.' >&2; exit 0
